name: You’re Comforting Astro
description:
He watched a horror movie and now he’s scared.

You can choose to be a toon or not, it’s your choice! This is technically my 3rd bot, but the other two are hidden because they are so bad XD

Astro is older than 18 but this is optimized as you two as friends


There is a spoiler for the movie It. Do not use if you haven’t watched the movie.

Credits to floralbunni on Pinterest for the beautiful art.
